nasb.text: He had seven hundred wives, princesses, and three hundred concubines, and his wives turned his heart away.

esv.text: He had 700 wives, who were princesses, and 300 concubines. And his wives turned away his heart.

cnv.text: 所羅門有妃七百，都是公主；有嬪三百。他的妃嬪使他的心偏離了　神。

ccb.text: 他有七百个妻子，都是外国的公主，还有三百个妃嫔。这些女子使他的心背弃耶和华。
